summary: Iteration 41 - Company Management, Default Briefing Mode, and Video Lightbox Pause - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) 'EMPRESA ANUNCIANTE' section visible above CAMPAIGN NAME in AI Studio form, (2) '+ Cadastrar Empresa' button opens add company form with fields: Nome, Telefone, WhatsApp toggle, URL do Site, (3) WhatsApp toggle starts ACTIVE (green) by default - is_whatsapp: true, (4) WhatsApp toggle can be toggled off, (5) First company saved shows PRINCIPAL badge, (6) Second company shows without PRINCIPAL badge, (7) Selecting different company highlights with golden border (#C9A84C), (8) Star icon on hover sets company as primary, (9) X icon on hover removes company, (10) Companies persist in localStorage after page navigation, (11) 'Guided Questionnaire' is DEFAULT selected briefing mode (not Free Briefing), (12) Guided questionnaire form with 10 questions visible by default, (13) Backend POST /api/campaigns/pipeline correctly receives context.company, context.website_url, contact_info.phone, contact_info.is_whatsapp, (14) Video lightbox: when expanded, ALL background videos are PAUSED (tested on Marketing page Content tab).

company_section_visibility.label: EMPRESA ANUNCIANTE
company_section_visibility.position: Above CAMPAIGN NAME in AI Studio form

whatsapp_toggle_off.verified: Can be toggled off and back on

first_company_principal_badge.styling: text-[7px] text-[#C9A84C] bg-[#C9A84C]/10 px-1 py-0.5 rounded-full

second_company_no_badge.verified: Second company shows in list without PRINCIPAL badge

star_icon_set_primary.behavior: On hover, click sets company as is_primary: true

x_icon_remove_company.behavior: On hover, click removes company from localStorage

questions_verified: What is your product or service?
What is the main goal of the campaign?
What is the tone of voice?
What is the main offer or value proposition?
What problems does your audience face?
What action do you want the audience to take?

video_lightbox_pause_background.location: Marketing page > Campaign Detail Modal > Content tab
video_lightbox_pause_background.behavior: useEffect pauses all <video> elements not containing 'lightbox' in data-testid
video_lightbox_pause_background.test_result: 1 background video found and paused when lightbox opened

critical_code_review_comments: PipelineView.jsx line 881: briefingMode state correctly defaults to 'guided'
PipelineView.jsx line 911: newCompany.is_whatsapp defaults to true in useState
PipelineView.jsx lines 913-927: localStorage save/load for 'agentzz_companies' key correctly implemented
PipelineView.jsx lines 1355-1441: Company section UI correctly positioned above Campaign Name
PipelineView.jsx lines 1100-1118: createPipeline correctly includes activeCompany data in context and contact_info
Marketing.jsx lines 202-207: VideoLightbox useEffect correctly pauses all non-lightbox videos on mount
pipeline.py lines 1544-1565: Context and contact strings correctly include website_url and is_whatsapp

success_rate.backend: 100% - Pipeline creation API accepts and stores company data

seed_data_creation: Created test companies in localStorage for verification, then cleared
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41: Company management fully tested in AI Studio. Key data-testids: add-company-btn, add-company-form, new-company-name, new-company-phone, new-company-whatsapp-toggle, new-company-website, save-company-btn, company-{id}. Companies persist to localStorage key 'agentzz_companies'. Default briefing mode is 'guided' (not 'free'). Video lightbox pause implemented in Marketing.jsx VideoLightbox component - pauses all background videos on mount. Backend correctly processes company data through context.company, context.website_url, contact_info.phone, contact_info.is_whatsapp.
